name: Sweet Flan Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the butter, cut into pieces, with the flour, sugar and salt, into a mixer.
2. Work it until the mixture resembles coarse semolina.
3. Add the egg yolk and the whole egg and do not work the machine for longer than necessary (VERY IMPORTANT) to amalgamate the eggs with the flour mixture.
4. Form it into a ball and leave it to rest in the refrigerator for several hours before using it.
(The pastry will keep very well in the refrigerator for a few days, wrapped in transparent film)
